ddls:
CREATE TABLE "farewell_messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farewell message */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated article */,
  "poster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the message */,
  "time_posted" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was posted */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The farewell message content */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the message was last updated */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the message this is a reply to */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the message is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farewell_messages_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES farewell_messages ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farewell_messages_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_farewell_messages_poster_id FOREIGN KEY ("poster_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article has been published */,
  "time_posted" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the article was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the article was last updated */,
  "word_count" INTEGER /* The word count of the article */,
  "reading_time" REAL /* The estimated reading time of the article in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile information of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_articles" (
  "user_article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-article association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the article (e.g., author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_articles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_articles_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who posted the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "time_posted" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the comment this is a reply to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES article_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farewell message */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who liked the message */,
  "time_liked" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the like was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_likes_message_id FOREIGN KEY ("message_id") REFERENCES farewell_messages ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the article */,
  "time_viewed" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the article was viewed */,
  "view_duration" REAL /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed (e.g., post, comment, like) */,
  "time_of_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the article */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)
